skills.name: git-commit-convention
intents: split mixed changes into separate commits
根据仓库规范生成提交信息
拆分混合改动为多个提交
useCases: User wants to commit staged changes following the repo's CONTRIBUTING.md rules.
User has mixed feature and fix changes and needs to split them into separate commits.
User asks Codex to write a commit message for the current diff.
用户要求根据仓库规范生成提交信息。
用户需要将功能改动和修复拆分成两个提交。

skills.name: oss-upload-folder
intents: upload local folder to Alibaba Cloud OSS
将本地目录同步到阿里云OSS
useCases: Upload a static website build output (dist/) to an OSS bucket for hosting.
Sync a local media folder to multiple OSS buckets for redundancy.
Preview OSS upload changes with --dry-run before executing the actual sync.
Use the Node.js version to upload files when the project already uses ali-oss.
Delete remote files not present locally using the --delete flag with confirmation.

skills.name: aws-s3-upload-folder
intents: 将本地文件夹上传到 S3
同步目录到 S3 存储桶
useCases: Upload a built React app from ./dist to s3://my-site-bucket/prod/
Sync a local assets folder to multiple S3 buckets for redundancy
Preview S3 upload with --dry-run before actual deployment
将构建好的 React 应用从 ./dist 上传到 s3://my-site-bucket/prod/
将本地资源文件夹同步到多个 S3 存储桶以实现冗余
在实际部署前使用 --dry-run 预览 S3 上传

skills.name: aws-cloudfront-invalidate
useCases: After deploying a static site to S3, invalidate /index.html and /assets/* on the CloudFront distribution.
Use --alias to ensure the correct distribution is targeted before running an invalidation.
Preview the invalidation paths with --dry-run before executing to avoid mistakes.
Invalidate a specific file like /images/logo.png to update it immediately on the CDN.
S3静态站点上传后，刷新CloudFront上的/index.html和/assets/*路径。
使用--alias校验域名对应的分发，避免刷错CDN。

skills.name: ai-cli-context-governance
intents: Reduce AI CLI slowness caused by large context
解决 AI CLI 长上下文导致的响应变慢
Prevent model hallucinations in long conversations
防止模型在长对话中产生幻觉
Design context compaction and retrieval for AI CLI
为 AI CLI 设计上下文压缩和检索机制
实现基于证据约束的生成
useCases: A developer wants to stop their AI CLI from getting slower each turn by implementing rolling summaries and retrieval.
开发者希望通过实现滚动摘要和检索，阻止 AI CLI 每轮都变慢。
A team needs to prevent the AI from inventing functions by enforcing evidence-only answers.
团队需要通过强制仅基于证据回答，防止 AI 编造函数。
An engineer is designing a new AI CLI and needs a layered context architecture with hot, warm, and cold contexts.
工程师正在设计新的 AI CLI，需要包含热、温、冷上下文的分层架构。

skills.name: bucket-upload-policy
intents: 判断大文件是否应上传到对象存储
生成制品清单避免提交二进制文件
规范 OSS/S3 上传路径和权限
保持仓库轻量，只保留链接和校验信息
为 skill 相关资产选择存储位置
useCases: 当 skill 包含 PDF 参考文档时，上传到 OSS 并生成 manifest 记录链接和校验值
当 skill 需要截图或视频作为示例时，上传到 S3 并在仓库中保留引用
当 skill 依赖大型测试文件或二进制样例时，使用本策略避免提交到 git
当希望公开访问生成的产物时，按规范上传到 public-skills 桶并记录公开 URL

skills.name: public-skills-catalog
intents: 查看仓库有哪些公开技能
了解技能的最新版本和标签
了解技能之间的关联关系
useCases: 用户询问“这个仓库怎么用”时，读取并渲染技能目录、分类和关联信息。
需要按分类（如代码生成、文档处理）查找合适的技能。
在安装某个技能前，检查关联技能并提示用户是否一起安装。
Codex 新增或更新技能时，自动同步更新目录、分类和关联 JSON 文件。
为其他仓库提供可复制的技能安装 prompt。
